message:
fix(mux): prevent browser hangs from silent frame drops and decoder error leaks

- Propagate WouldBlock from sendFrame instead of silently swallowing it,
  force keyframe after dropped frames so browser H.264 decoder can recover
- Track frames_dropped in perf log for visibility into send failures
- Fix VideoDecoder error callback to reset pendingDecode and recover the
  decoder instead of leaking pending count permanently
- Use decoder.decodeQueueSize for P-frame drop decisions (accurate,
  browser-tracked) instead of manually tracked pendingDecode counter
- Prefer hardware H.264 decode to reduce CPU load at high resolutions
